scripts.dev: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$p = if ($env:INIT_CWD) { $env:INIT_CWD } else { (Get-Location).Path }; if ($p.StartsWith('\\?\\')) { $p = $p.Substring(4) }; Set-Location $p; node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js"
scripts.build: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$p = if ($env:INIT_CWD) { $env:INIT_CWD } else { (Get-Location).Path }; if ($p.StartsWith('\\?\\')) { $p = $p.Substring(4) }; Set-Location $p; node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc && node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js build"
scripts.preview: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "$p = if ($env:INIT_CWD) { $env:INIT_CWD } else { (Get-Location).Path }; if ($p.StartsWith('\\?\\')) { $p = $p.Substring(4) }; Set-Location $p; node ./node_modules/vite/bin/vite.js preview"
